title: lastrea calcarata var. sericea
intro: Lastrea calcarata var. sericea, also known as the silver fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, and is used to treat various health conditions such as digestive issues and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Lastrea calcarata var. sericea include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the dried fronds in hot water or using a solvent like ethanol or glycerin to extract its medicinal compounds.
